pkgmetadata.longdescription:
VictoriaMetrics is a fast, cost-effective, and scalable time-series database. The single-node binary handles ingestion, storage, and querying for fleets where a clustered deployment would be overkill.
Compatible with InfluxDB line protocol, Graphite, OpenTSDB, Prometheus remote_write, and OpenTelemetry. The fleet uses it as the central sink for sensor data (BLE temperature/humidity, USB temper devices, smartctl readings) and pushes via the InfluxDB write API.
Built from source using the Gentoo Go toolchain. Includes the victoria-metrics single-node binary plus the vmagent / vmctl / vmbackup / vmrestore companion tools for ingestion proxying, backfill migrations, and snapshot management.
